<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk008.pdf#page=13 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p374 -->

NYMPHENBURG, HAUPTSCHLOSS


[[File:Band03-2_chunk008_p013_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-2_chunk008_p013_img002.jpg|thumb|W<sub>2</sub> Mars und Venus]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p375 -->
